claim: The Minkowski metric in Cartesian coordinates has zero Christoffel symbols and zero curvature.
success_criteria: Defines the Minkowski metric with signature (-,+,+,+) or equivalent stated convention.
Computes Christoffel symbols or curvature tensors.
Shows all tested connection/curvature components vanish.
failure_modes: Assumes flatness without computing any tensor component.
Uses inconsistent metric signature without stating it.
prompt: Validate that the Minkowski metric in Cartesian coordinates has vanishing Christoffel symbols and zero curvature. Show the computed residual or tensor components used for the verdict.
